---
name: Maintenance/Update
about: Update dependencies, refactor code, or improve infrastructure/documentation.
title: "[CHORE]"
labels: chore
assignees: ''

---

**Update Type**
- [ ] Dependency/Package Update
- [ ] Code Refactoring (No functionality changes)
- [ ] Documentation Update
- [ ] CI/CD, Scripts, or Infrastructure

**Current State vs. New State**
- From (Current): [e.g., Axios v0.21.0 / Mixed code in file X]
- To (New): [e.g., Axios v1.4.0 / Functions separated into imported files]

**Are there "Compatibility-Breaking Changes" (Compatibility Issues)?**
- [ ] Yes (Explain below how to mitigate)
- [ ] No

*(If you selected "Yes", detail here what needs to be adjusted in the rest of the project to prevent it from being interrupted)*

**Additional context**
Add any other context or screenshots about the feature request here.


**References (Changelog)**
- [Link to Changelog / Release Notes](#)
